goal: Build me a SaaS starter with auth, Stripe subscriptions, a Postgres database, dashboard, and a polished landing page.
lastRunSummary: VERIFICATION FIX PASS 3/3 complete. Two issues resolved: (1) postinstall script now gracefully skips prisma generate when DATABASE_URL is unset (instead of crashing npm install/build). (2) .env file created with placeholder DATABASE_URL so Prisma schema validation passes during local dev. All 6 server env vars are set as managed app secrets (not code bugs). Vercel deploy blocked by expired integration token — user needs to reconnect Vercel in Settings → Integrations.
